tagline: Your program in one workspace. Faster intake. One source of truth. Broker-ready communication.
audience: Commercial insureds, risk managers, and executive buyers evaluating operations software
tone: Succinct, punctual, business-first — not generic AI hype

deck_order.headline: All coverages in one view
deck_order.subhead: Policy summary, limits, premiums, and exposures — no spreadsheet archaeology
bullets: GL, Auto, Property, WC, and Umbrella on one screen
AI or Manual intake — same normalized vault either way
One-click exposure workbooks and BOR letters
deck_order.speaker_note: Opens on program visibility: every line, carrier, limit, and premium in minutes.

deck_order.headline: Your process. Your controls.
deck_order.subhead: Schema-guided manual import when you want prompts + JSON, not black-box extraction
bullets: Download per-LOB instructions matched to Vault JSON schema
Run your agent on policy PDFs; upload .txt or .json per line
Same Portfolio Overview and exports as full AI mode
deck_order.speaker_note: Enterprise buyers see hybrid control — AI speed without losing auditability.

deck_order.headline: Detailed exposure views
deck_order.subhead: GL locations, NHTSA VIN validation, and WC class codes — one session, underwriter-ready
bullets: GL locations and exposures in sortable, exportable tables
NHTSA VIN Check: strikethrough errors, one-click accept corrections
WC class codes, basis, and amounts by state with grand total payroll
deck_order.speaker_note: Consolidated exposures story: GL grid, Auto VIN check, WC class codes with grand total.

deck_order.headline: Broker Connect
deck_order.subhead: One endorsement transaction — edit, stack, confirm once, send once
bullets: Session rail lists every line; start one draft, stack every change
Edit GL, Auto, Property, WC, Umbrella, and Account tables inline
Diff-style review before send — nothing vague in the request
Confirm endorsement: parts count, slip PDF, narrative, Confirm & send email
deck_order.speaker_note: Full Broker Connect flow: New endorsement → inline edits → stack changes → confirm & send.

deck_order.headline: Insurance email inside the workflow
bullets: Inbox, Sent, Spam with search and unread filter
COI thread visible beside portfolio imports sidebar
POWERED BY NYLAS · enterprise Outlook sync
deck_order.speaker_note: Header: POWERED BY NYLAS · axiom_coi@outlook.com. Show COI thread in list.

deck_order.headline: Compose without leaving AXIOM
deck_order.subhead: Reply, attach, tag — broker traffic stays traceable
bullets: Pick a thread or Compose new email
Integrated with Broker Connect outbound (COI-1 · END-1 tracker)
deck_order.speaker_note: Empty state with dashed panel and Compose new email button.

closing.headline: Insurance operations with intelligence built in
closing.body: AXIOM Insurance Manager turns policy PDFs and email threads into one auditable portfolio — then moves COIs, endorsements, and applications through Broker Connect and Mailman on infrastructure you already trust.

architecture_proof_points: Vault-aligned JSON schema per LOB with format validation
Hybrid AI + manual intake; same deliverables either path
Assistant tool-grounded on session/vault facts — not invented limits
Nylas for Outlook mailbox sync and send (API keys server-side)
Command center for the insured — not replacement for broker or carrier of record
